html:
Exclusive to:

Stuffed Night Cap is a Meat Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the From Beyond updates. It is cooked in the Crock Pot by combining 2 raw Moon Shrooms, 1 raw Monster Meat and a filler.

The purpose of the Stuffed Night Cap is to put Meat eating Creatures to sleep. When a creature eats a Stuffed Night Cap, it will sleep for 20 seconds unless attacked.

When consumed, it restores 18.75 Hunger, but at a cost of 20 Health and 15 Sanity. It also puts the Character to sleep.

Recipe

×2

Example

Tips

  • It can be used on Bearger to lose aggro after destroying trees, though this can be used with any food, it may work better with Stuffed Night Caps, as they put Bearger to sleep.

Trivia

  • The Stuffed Night Cap was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Stuffed Night Cap Concept Art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce Rhymes with Play.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

–Wurt

–Wanda

'''Stuffed Night Cap''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[From Beyond]]'' updates. It is cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by combining 2 raw [[Moon Shroom]]s, 1 raw [[Monster Meat]] and a filler.

The purpose of the Stuffed Night Cap is to put [[Meats|Meat]] eating [[Creatures]] to [[Sleeping|sleep]]. When a creature eats a Stuffed Night Cap, it will sleep for 20 seconds unless attacked. 

When consumed, it restores 18.75 Hunger, but at a cost of 20 Health and 15 Sanity. It also puts the [[Character]] to sleep.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Shroom
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Monster Meat
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Night Cap
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Example ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Shroom
|item2 = Moon Shroom
|item3 = Monster Meat
|item4 = Carrot
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Night Cap}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* It can be used on [[Bearger]] to lose aggro after destroying trees, though this can be used with any food, it may work better with Stuffed Night Caps, as they put Bearger to sleep.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Stuffed Night Cap was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Scrappy Scavengers|Scrappy Scavengers]]'' update.
